evidence: "This is a MUST HAVE for any SciFi fan."
"The plot is not easy to figure out and that makes for a good show to me."
"The plot is thickening and the suspense is just at the right amount."
"You are captivated by the very first show and the ending of this season just leaves you hungry to find out more..."
"The actors play their parts with excitement and makes the movie intriguing at every turn!"
"This is a timeless Classic! One which I will return to watch over and over again."
"Compelling will hook you in an instant!"
"I enjoy watching this with my daughter in law and grand daughter."

summary: The user has a strong preference for fantasy and sci-fi genres, enjoying complex narratives with immersive world-building. They value high production quality and emotional resonance in their viewing experiences, often seeking engaging and captivating stories.
